name: ws-coding-workflows
description: AI-powered development orchestration for Claude Code. Includes ws-orchestrator (plan-build-verify-document lifecycle), ws-planner (structured task decomposition), ws-dev (pattern-locked implementation with frontend/backend/fullstack support), ws-verifier (independent output verification), and ws-codebase-documenter (documentation generation with prescriptive guides and consistency checking). Works with Node.js/TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, .NET, Java, and PHP projects.
